headline.purpose: Section headers, dialog titles, page-level identifiers. One per major surface.

title.purpose: Subsection labels, toolbar component names, named groupings.

body.purpose: All descriptive text, list item labels, metadata. Cap at 65ch in flowing contexts.

label.purpose: Chips, tag badges, icon button labels, counters. Minimum size in the system.

shadows.name: ambient-dialog
shadows.purpose: Floating dialogs and menus only. Diffuse dark shadow signals modal elevation. Not used on cards or surface panels.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions. Exit animations only.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Micro-interactions: icon hover, photo name reveal, button state.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Layout transitions: split-pane width change, panel open/close.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action in dialogs and the landing page. Observatory Slate on Deep Space.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(63% 0.09 245); color: oklch(9% 0.003 245); padding: 8px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-family: Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(70% 0.09 245); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(63% 0.09 245); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: oklch(55% 0.09 245); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Cancel and secondary actions in dialog action rows.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(91% 0.005 245); padding: 8px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-family: Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 100ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(91% 0.005 245 / 0.08); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(63% 0.09 245); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Navigation Rail Item
components.description: Primary app navigation. Rail collapses to icons at rest, expands on hover.
components.html: Photos
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 100ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); color: oklch(63% 0.005 245); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(91% 0.005 245 / 0.08); color: oklch(91% 0.005 245); } .ds-nav-item--active { background: oklch(63% 0.09 245); color: oklch(9% 0.003 245); } .ds-nav-item--active:hover { background: oklch(70% 0.09 245); } .ds-nav-icon { fill: currentColor; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-nav-label { font-family: Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.015em; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Photo Grid Tile
components.description: A single photo in the virtual-scrolled grid. Square, cover-fit, hover reveals filename.
components.html: landscape-001.jpg
components.css: .ds-photo-tile { position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: oklch(14% 0.003 245); cursor: pointer; width: 200px; height: 200px; } .ds-photo-img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block; } .ds-photo-overlay { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; padding: 8px; background: linear-gradient(transparent, oklch(5% 0.003 245 / 0.75)); } .ds-photo-name { display: block; opacity: 0; color: oklch(91% 0.005 245); font-family: Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; transition: opacity 100ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-photo-tile:hover .ds-photo-name { opacity: 1; } .ds-photo-icons { display: flex; gap: 4px; color: oklch(91% 0.005 245); margin-top: 2px; }

components.name: Tag Chip
components.description: Applied tag badge. User color overrides the default surface background via CSS custom property.
components.css: .ds-chip-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--chip-bg, oklch(18% 0.003 245)); color: oklch(91% 0.005 245); font-family: Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Outlined combobox in the main toolbar. Active filter tokens appear as chips inside the field.
components.css: .ds-input-search { display: flex; align-items: center; border: 1px solid oklch(30% 0.003 245); border-radius: 4px; background: oklch(14% 0.003 245); padding: 4px 8px; gap: 4px; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); min-width: 240px; } .ds-input-search:focus-within { border-color: oklch(63% 0.09 245); } .ds-input-search__field { flex: 1; border: none; background: transparent; color: oklch(91% 0.005 245); font-family: Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; outline: none; } .ds-input-search__field::placeholder { color: oklch(63% 0.005 245); } .ds-input-search__btn { background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; color: oklch(63% 0.005 245); padding: 4px; display: flex; align-items: center; transition: color 100ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-input-search__btn:hover { color: oklch(91% 0.005 245); }

components.name: Dialog Card
components.description: Modal form container. Lifted Slate background, ambient shadow. Title + content + action row.
components.html:
Add Tags
Apply tags to the selected 12 photos.
components.css: .ds-dialog { background: oklch(18% 0.003 245); border-radius: 8px; max-width: 80vw; min-width: 320px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px oklch(5% 0 0 / 0.6); overflow: hidden; } .ds-dialog__title { padding: 16px 24px; font-family: Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(91% 0.005 245); } .ds-dialog__content { padding: 0 24px 16px; font-family: Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: oklch(82% 0.005 245); line-height: 1.5; } .ds-dialog__actions { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 16px; border-top: 1px solid oklch(25% 0.003 245); } .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(91% 0.005 245); padding: 8px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-family: Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 100ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(91% 0.005 245 / 0.08); } .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(63% 0.09 245); color: oklch(9% 0.003 245); padding: 8px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-family: Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(70% 0.09 245); }

narrative.overview:
The interface exists to serve the photograph. Like an observatory dome, everything in the environment is dark by design — not as aesthetic statement, but because the work demands it. The canvas recedes so what you're examining stands forward. Controls are present but never intrusive: a rail of icons at the periphery, a toolbar holding only what the current task requires, a detail panel that opens when called and collapses when dismissed.

The design vocabulary is minimal and systematic. No decorative surfaces. No color used for atmosphere. Hierarchy comes from position and weight: the photo grid is the center of mass, and the chrome around it compresses toward the edges. When a photo is open in the detail pane, the grid shrinks to a column — the UI physically yields.

This system rejects the consumer warmth of Google Photos, the busy panel density of Adobe's tools, and the personality-free legibility of stock Material Design. It is a single-surface desktop tool built for someone who knows what they're doing and wants the interface to respect that.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first: the background is the canvas, not a style choice
Functional restraint: every element has exactly one job
Quiet hierarchy: structure through layout and weight, never color saturation
The photo leads: chrome compresses when content is active
Keyboard-reachable: all primary actions accessible without a mouse

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The primary accent appears on ≤15% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point: when Observatory Slate appears, it means something is active or selected. Ambient saturation destroys that signal.

rules.name: The No Raw Black Rule
rules.body: Never use #000 or #fff. Every neutral is tinted toward the primary hue (chroma 0.003–0.005). The effect is imperceptible but prevents the cheapness of a raw terminal palette.

rules.name: The User Chaos Rule
rules.body: Tags carry user-assigned colors. These are content, not system design. The system does not govern them — it accommodates them.

rules.name: The Flat Scale Rule
rules.body: There is no display tier. The maximum headline size is 20px. If something needs to feel large, it does so through whitespace and position, not a large font. Resist adding a hero size to any app screen.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only in modal contexts (dialogs, menus). A card that lifts on hover is a consumer UI pattern — prohibited here.

dos: Do use Observatory Slate only for active/selected states, primary actions, and focused input borders.
Do let photos fill their tiles completely. Aspect-ratio 1/1, cover fit.
Do use font-weight (400 vs. 500) as the primary hierarchy tool within a size step.
Do let the nav rail communicate active state via the primary color chip.
Do use the toolbar to compress controls — no floating action buttons.
Do use tonal surface steps to separate layers instead of shadows.
Do maintain WCAG AA contrast (4.5:1 body, 3:1 large text) across all combinations.
donts: Don't use green (#4caf50) as the primary accent. It was replaced.
Don't use card grids where every card is the same size with icon + heading + text.
Don't apply border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use gradient text or background-clip: text with a gradient fill.
Don't use floating action buttons. All primary actions live in the toolbar or dialog rows.
Don't design for infinite scroll or content discovery feeds.
Don't use pastel accents or soft consumer-app aesthetics.
Don't add modal dialogs as the first response to any user action.
Don't let the UI compete with the photo.
